reason: Geopolitical escalation (Iran hitting Saudi refinery) is driving a significant risk-off sentiment across global markets, evidenced by bleeding U.S. stock futures and Bitcoin slipping below $66,000. This is compounded by substantial institutional outflows of over $9 billion from Bitcoin and Ether ETFs over four months, indicating sustained selling pressure. Upcoming U.S. jobs report and crypto miner earnings will add further volatility, suggesting extreme caution is warranted.
headlines: U.S. equity futures fall in pre-market trading as oil, gold retreat from highs
Hong Kong links up with Shanghai trade authorities to put cargo data on blockchain
Riot Platforms, Core Scientific earnings, U.S. jobs report: Crypto Week Ahead
Bitcoin slips below $66,000, U.S. stock futures bleed as Iran hits Saudi oil refinery
Over $9 billion flees bitcoin and ether ETFs in four months
